mdSummary:
# OtpInput

One-time password input, auto-advances between boxes.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Inputs
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/otp-input

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| OtpInput | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| OtpInput | Length | `int` | `6` |  |
| OtpInput | Value | `string` | `""` |  |
| OtpInput | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string>` | `` |  |
| OtpInput | OnComplete | `EventCallback<string>` | `` |  |
| OtpInput | InputMode | `string` | `"Numeric"` |  |
| OtpInput | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| OtpInput | Masked | `bool` | `` |  |
| OtpInput | Separator | `string?` | `` |  |
| OtpInput | GroupSizes | `int[]?` | `` |  |
| OtpInput | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| OtpInput | Invalid | `bool` | `` |  |
| OtpInput | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| OtpInput | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| OtpInput | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| OtpInput | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| OtpInput | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| OtpInput | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string>`)
- `OnComplete` (`EventCallback<string>`)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `ComponentInteropService` ()

## Keyboard
- `Backspace` — HandleKeyDown handles Backspace in OtpInput.razor
- `Delete` — HandleKeyDown handles Delete in OtpInput.razor

## Example
```razor
<OtpInput />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-destructive`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/OtpInput/OtpInput.razor`
